Here is the list of signs and their scores:
1. Aries - 8/10 - Fiery and impulsive, Aries are known for taking risks, but can be reckless.
2. Taurus - 7/10 - Practical and dependable, Taurus are stable and reliable, but can be stubborn.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Curious and adaptable, Geminis are quick-witted and communicative, but can be flighty.
4. Cancer - 6/10 - Emotional and nurturing, Cancers are caring and protective, but can be moody.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, Leos are natural performers, but can be prideful.
6. Virgo - 7/10 - Analytical and hardworking, Virgos are detail-oriented and precise, but can be perfectionistic.
7. Libra - 9/10 - Diplomatic and charming, Librans are fair-minded and balanced, but can be indecisive.
8. Scorpio - 8/10 - Passionate and intense, Scorpios are perceptive and private, but can be vengeful.
9. Sagittarius - 7/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, Sagittarians are freedom-loving and philosophical, but can be blunt.
10. Capricorn - 6/10 - Disciplined and responsible, Capricorns are ambitious and practical, but can be serious.
11. Aquarius - 8/10 - Humanitarian and independent, Aquarians are inventive and unconventional, but can be detached.
12. Pisces - 7/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, Pisces are dreamy and artistic, but can be scattered.
Note: The scores are subjective and based on general astrological interpretations of each sign's personality traits.
